stories.title: Study Finds AI Must Earn the Right to Move Money
stories.simple_summary: Researchers studied whether AI systems should be allowed to handle money and banking. They concluded AI needs to prove it's trustworthy before being given that responsibility.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mostly important for banks and financial companies deciding how much to trust AI — not something you need to act on right now.

stories.title: Meta's new AI image generator may use your Instagram photos. Here's how to opt out
stories.simple_summary: Meta (which owns Instagram) is building an AI tool that can create images, and it might use photos you've posted. They're letting people opt out if they don't want their photos used.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Instagram, you may want to check your settings to control whether your photos help train Meta's AI.

stories.title: OpenAI says GPT 5.6 is the ‘preferred model’ for Microsoft Copilot 365 amid breakup chatter
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI released a new, improved version of its AI called GPT-5.6 that will power Microsoft's workplace software like Word and Excel.
stories.why_it_matters: If you use Microsoft Office tools, you may eventually see smarter AI features built in, but this doesn't require any action from you now.

stories.title: Microsoft’s carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year
stories.simple_summary: Microsoft's pollution and carbon emissions went up 25 percent last year because they're running more powerful computers for their AI work.
stories.why_it_matters: This is mainly relevant to investors and people concerned about climate change — it doesn't affect your daily use of their products.

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role
stories.simple_summary: A high-ranking executive at OpenAI had to step down from her full-time job due to a health condition and is now working part-time instead.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters mainly to investors tracking OpenAI — it doesn't affect regular users of their AI tools.

stories.title: Fidji Simo steps down from leading OpenAI’s AGI work due to illness
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI's second-in-command, Fidji Simo, is stepping back from her full-time leadership role because of an illness and will work part-time as an advisor.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters mainly to investors tracking OpenAI — it doesn't affect regular users of their AI tools.

stories.title: OpenAI launches its new family of models with GPT-5.6
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI released a new family of AI models called GPT-5.6 with improvements, including better security against computer attacks.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a technical update for developers and businesses using OpenAI's technology — most regular users won't notice an immediate change.

stories.title: An AI agent startup just let its agent run its $100M fundraise
stories.simple_summary: A company called Lyzr used its own AI agent to help raise $100 million in funding, which shows their AI can actually do real work like sales and negotiation.
stories.why_it_matters: This is interesting proof that AI agents can handle real business tasks, but it mostly matters to investors and large companies considering using such tools.

stories.title: OpenAI is shutting down Atlas, but its AI browser ambitions are still growing
stories.simple_summary: OpenAI is shutting down a browser it built that used AI, but it's moving those AI features into other products like a Chrome extension.
stories.why_it_matters: If you were using OpenAI's browser, you'll need to switch to their other tools — otherwise, this doesn't affect you.

stories.title: Elon Musk praises Mythos/Fable, promises not to ‘cut off’ Anthropic
stories.simple_summary: Elon Musk is reassuring the AI company Anthropic that he won't interfere with their business if they use his servers to run their AI.
stories.why_it_matters: This is a business deal between powerful people and companies — it doesn't affect ordinary people or small-business owners.

stories.title: Can AI answer the $3 trillion question?
stories.simple_summary: People are debating whether the $3 trillion investment in AI is actually worth the money and will actually deliver real value.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters to investors asking if AI is overhyped and overpriced — if you're not investing in AI stocks, this is financial expert talk.

stories.title: Nobel-Winning U.S. Chemist Will Move to China to Lead A.I. Institute
stories.simple_summary: A famous American scientist who won a Nobel Prize is moving to China to lead an AI research institute there.
stories.why_it_matters: This matters mainly to people interested in where top scientific talent is going — it doesn't affect your daily life.
